title: Mexican Pike Pilaf
description: A flavorful Mexican pilaf dish with poached pike and a blend of spices.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil or parchment paper.
Place the pike fillet on the prepared baking sheet.
Season the pike with salt, pepper, and smoked paprika.
Poach the pike in the oven for 8-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the pike is cooking, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender.
Add the Mexican rice pilaf to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Stir in the chopped cilantro, lime juice, and ground cumin.
Once the pike is cooked, flake it into the skillet with the rice mixture.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve the pike pilaf hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
